objective: Move beyond terminal-frontier exact-vs-rejected boundaries by producing harder compositional splits, non-number chess-derived targets, and structured baselines that must beat hand geometry probes.
non_negotiables: No target may enter training unless it is exact, schema-valid, and tied to a verifier certificate.
Rejected rows remain gate/accounting evidence and must not become exact target labels.
Every OOD split must report raw-position, D4-symmetry, certificate, generator-family, and target-support leakage.
Any learned result must compare against the fixed FEN gate, hand geometry probe, and train-majority target floors.
If a hand-coded feature solves a task, the result is a baseline warning, not a main research claim.

tasks.prompt: Specify the next hard target family after Wave 15. It must include at least one compositional OOD split and one target that cannot be solved by the current hand geometry probe. Define what counts as non-number chess-derived value evidence, which frontier metadata targets are acceptable interim targets, and which controls falsify agency/temperature claims.
outputs: Hard-target domain and target definitions
Positive and negative controls for composition, option structure, and agency
Verification gate updates for unseen target labels and hand-probe failures
acceptance: The spec states why Wave 14 KNK is too easy
Every proposed target has a verifier path and a falsification condition
Temperature and agency claims remain inactive unless supported by nonconstant exact targets

tasks.prompt: Design the first strict composition certificate that can support exact labels rather than rejected controls. Start with synthetic or tightly constrained chess-derived boards where component independence can be machine-checked. Do not broaden claims to general chess independence.
outputs: Composition certificate fields and digest contract
Positive certificate tests and counterexample tests
Clear unsupported status for weak or unchecked decompositions
acceptance: Certificates are deterministic and validate before digesting
At least one positive composition fixture passes
At least one false-composition counterexample fails

tasks.prompt: Extend or document the exact value contract needed for chess-derived non-number targets. Prioritize canonical game-tree/switch outputs, thermograph mean/temperature, and target-support metadata that downstream reports can consume without parsing display strings.
outputs: Exact payload support for the required non-number target classes or documented blockers
Golden tests for switch/game-tree target serialization and thermograph fields
Compatibility notes for astralbase and partizan loaders
acceptance: Existing number/switch payloads remain byte-stable
New or documented target classes have golden tests
Unsupported exactness is explicit rather than approximated

tasks.prompt: Add a deterministic generator for the Wave 16 hard-target shard. It should emit exact rows only when the composition/value path is verified, rejected rows for unsupported candidates, and enough metadata for partizan to build family, composition, target-support, and symmetry leakage reports.
outputs: Generator CLI for the hard-target shard
Exact provenance with composition/value certificates
Tests for deterministic generation and family/target coverage
acceptance: The generator is deterministic across two runs
Exact rows carry verifier provenance and certificate digests
Rejected rows expose unsupported reason codes

tasks.prompt: Wire the Wave 16 shard into the deterministic orchestrator and reporting stack. Required reports: manifest, schema validation, symmetry-safe split, composition/family holdout, exact-only target-support coverage, fixed floors, and hand-probe baselines where applicable.
outputs: Wave 16 JSONL artifact and manifest
Symmetry-safe OOD split reports
Target-support coverage reports with unseen-label accounting
Updated smoke tests
commands: python3 -m py_compile engine/ml_model.py engine/test.py engine/orchestrator.py agents/network.py agents/label_schema.py
acceptance: Reports fail loudly on symmetry leakage or unseen target labels
Every split report records generator-family counts
Artifacts cite the exact astralbase commit and schema version

tasks.prompt: Train or implement the first structured baseline for the Wave 16 hard target. It must report against the same symmetry-safe splits as the fixed floor and hand geometry probe, and it must include failure analysis if it does not beat those baselines.
outputs: Structured baseline report
Ablation or control against scalar/hand-feature inputs
Experiment matrix update with exact metrics and limitations
acceptance: Metrics include train/dev/test and OOD slices
The report compares to fixed and hand-feature baselines
No claim is activated if the structured model fails the baseline comparison

tasks.prompt: Audit Wave 16 for overclaiming. Mark which claims remain inactive, which baselines are too strong, which target labels are unseen or under-supported, and which results are vulnerable to hand-coded geometry or leakage.
outputs: Claim ledger update
Reviewer-risk notes for Wave 16
Next-wave blockers
acceptance: Every active claim has evidence, baseline, and falsification condition
Known failures are documented instead of hidden
The next wave has concrete blockers rather than vague research intent

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/network.py validate && python3 agents/network.py validate-wave agents/waves/wave_16_harder_targets.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The network and Wave 16 plan are internally consistent.
Current dataset reports and smoke tests pass.

integration_gates.command: python3 -m py_compile engine/ml_model.py engine/test.py engine/orchestrator.py agents/network.py agents/label_schema.py
integration_gates.success_signal: Python orchestration and reporting code compiles.

integration_gates.command: cd ../thermograph && cargo test && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cd ../bitmesh && cargo test && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cd ../astralbase && cargo test && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
integration_gates.success_signal: All engine crates pass tests and clippy after integration.
